name: chameleon-containers
description: Firefox extension combining Chameleon's fingerprint spoofing with JShelter's API protection, with per-container isolation

scripts.dev: npm run build:dev && npm run copy-assets
scripts.build: vite build && npm run copy-assets && npm run fix-html
scripts.build:prod: vite build --mode production && npm run copy-assets && npm run fix-html
scripts.copy-assets: cp manifest.json dist/ && cp -r public/icons dist/
scripts.fix-html: mv dist/src/popup/index.html dist/popup/ 2>/dev/null || true && mv dist/src/pages/ip-warning.html dist/pages/ 2>/dev/null || true && rm -rf dist/src 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.package: npm run build:prod && cd dist && zip -r ../chameleon-containers.zip .
